notes: This manifest validates the integration-governance lane, not a standalone web product.
Integrations QA is operator-audit and artifact-driven.

suites.label: Integration registry parses and contains entries
suites.command: python3 -c "import sys,yaml; data=yaml.safe_load(open('dashboards/integrations/integration-registry.yaml')); entries=data.get('entries',[]); print('PASS:',len(entries),'integration registry entries loaded') if entries else None; sys.exit(0 if entries else 1)"

suites.label: Integration governance core docs exist
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; required=['dashboards/integrations/README.md','dashboards/integrations/integration-registry.yaml','dashboards/integrations/server-integration-inventory-2026-04.md','dashboards/integrations/centralized-integration-management-plan.md']; missing=[p for p in required if not Path(p).is_file()]; [print('MISSING:',p) for p in missing]; print('PASS: all integration governance core docs present') if not missing else None; sys.exit(1 if missing else 0)"

suites.label: Monitor unresolved integration owners
suites.command: python3 -c "import yaml; data=yaml.safe_load(open('dashboards/integrations/integration-registry.yaml')); entries=data.get('entries',[]); unresolved=[e['id'] for e in entries if e.get('owner')=='needs-owner-confirmation']; print('MONITOR:',len(unresolved),'entries still need owner confirmation'); [print('  -',item) for item in unresolved]"
